'''''Pride of Selonia''''' was a modified [[Lancer-class frigate/Legends|''Lancer''-class frigate]] under the command of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Todra Mayn]] that served in the [[Galactic Alliance Defense Force]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. The warship accompanied the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] on its mission to reestablish contact with several outlying sectors of [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] space that had been cut off in the wake of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] attacks on [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]] relay stations.

Though the vessel still retained her original armament of twenty [[Quad laser cannon/Legends|quad laser cannons]], the ''Pride of Selonia'' had been modified to enable it to carry a composite squadron of [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing starfighters]] and [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] [[Nssis-class Clawcraft|clawcraft]] from [[Twin Suns Squadron|Twin Suns]] and [[Vanguard Squadron (Hapes)|Chiss Squadrons]], which served under the joint command of [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]] and [[Jagged Fel]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic II: Refugee]]''
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic III: Reunion]]''
